class.name: DotIniFile
class.brief_description: INI configuration file handler with macros, type constraints, and serialization utilities.
class.description:
Provides an extended INI configuration system with support for sections, keys, macros, type constraints, and multiple serialization formats.
It can load and save configuration data from files, strings, buffers, and encrypted sources. It also supports value interpolation, comments, automatic saving, and merging with other DotIniFile instances.
This class is designed as a more powerful alternative to ConfigFile, adding features such as macro expansion, typed values, and include handling.

method.name: add_macro
method.description: Defines a macro with the given [param name] and [param value].

method.name: add_type_constraint
method.description: Adds a type constraint for the specified [param section] and [param key].

method.name: append_value
method.description: Appends [param value] to an existing key. If the key does not store an array, it will be converted into one.

method.name: check_for_updates
method.description: Checks whether the underlying file has changed on disk. Returns [code]true[/code] if it has been modified.

method.name: clear
method.description: Removes all sections, keys, macros, and constraints.

method.name: clear_section
method.description: Removes all keys from the specified [param section] without deleting the section itself.

method.name: clone
method.description: Returns a deep copy of this [DotIniFile] instance.

method.name: ensure_value
method.description: Returns the value at [param section]/[param key], creating it with [param default_value] if it does not exist.

method.name: erase_section
method.description: Removes the entire section and all its keys.

method.name: erase_section_key
method.description: Removes a specific key from a section.

method.name: from_config_file
method.description: Populates this instance using data from a [ConfigFile].

method.name: from_dictionary
method.description: Populates this instance from a nested dictionary structure.

method.name: get_global_fallback
method.description: Returns the global fallback [DotIniFile] used when a value is missing.

method.name: get_included_files
method.description: Returns a list of included [DotIniFile] instances.

method.name: get_key_comment
method.description: Returns the comment associated with the specified key.

method.name: get_keys_matching
method.description: Returns keys in a section matching the given pattern.

method.name: get_macro
method.description: Returns the value of a defined macro.

method.name: get_section_as_dict
method.description: Returns all key-value pairs in a section as a dictionary.

method.name: get_section_comment
method.description: Returns the comment associated with a section.

method.name: get_section_keys
method.description: Returns all keys within a section.

method.name: get_sections
method.description: Returns all section names.

method.name: get_value
method.description: Returns the value for a key, optionally performing macro interpolation. Returns [param default] if not found.

method.name: get_value_array
method.description: Returns the value as an [Array]. If the stored value is not an array, it may be converted. If [param interpolate] is [code]true[/code], macro interpolation is applied.

method.name: get_value_b64
method.description: Returns the value decoded from Base64. If the key is not found, returns [param default].

method.name: get_value_bool
method.description: Returns the value converted to a [bool]. If the key is not found, returns [param default]. If [param interpolate] is [code]true[/code], macro interpolation is applied.

method.name: get_value_float
method.description: Returns the value converted to a [float]. If the key is not found, returns [param default]. If [param interpolate] is [code]true[/code], macro interpolation is applied.

method.name: get_value_int
method.description: Returns the value converted to an [int]. If the key is not found, returns [param default]. If [param interpolate] is [code]true[/code], macro interpolation is applied.

method.name: get_value_raw
method.description: Returns the raw string value without applying interpolation. If the key is not found, returns [param default].

method.name: get_value_string
method.description: Returns the value as a [String]. If the key is not found, returns [param default]. If [param interpolate] is [code]true[/code], macro interpolation is applied.

method.name: has_section
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the section exists.

method.name: has_section_key
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the specified key exists.

method.name: is_autosave_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if autosave is enabled. When enabled, changes to the configuration are automatically written to disk.

method.name: is_read_only
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the file is in read-only mode. When read-only, modifications to values or structure are not allowed.

method.name: load
method.description: Loads configuration data from a file. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], merges with existing data.

method.name: load_encrypted
method.description: Loads configuration data from an encrypted file at [param path] using the provided binary [param key]. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], the loaded data is merged with existing data instead of replacing it. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: load_encrypted_pass
method.description: Loads configuration data from an encrypted file at [param path] using the provided password [param pass]. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], the loaded data is merged with existing data instead of replacing it. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: load_from_base64
method.description: Loads configuration data from a Base64-encoded string. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], the loaded data is merged with existing data instead of replacing it. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: load_from_buffer
method.description: Loads configuration data from a binary buffer. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], the loaded data is merged with existing data instead of replacing it. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: load_from_string
method.description: Loads configuration data from a plain text string in INI format. If [param append] is [code]true[/code], the loaded data is merged with existing data instead of replacing it. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: merge_with
method.description: Merges another [DotIniFile] into this one. If [param overwrite] is [code]true[/code], existing values are replaced.

method.name: remove_type_constraint
method.description: Removes any type constraint associated with the specified [param section] and [param key], allowing values of any type to be assigned.

method.name: rename_key
method.description: Renames a key from [param old_key] to [param new_key] within the given [param section], preserving its value and metadata.

method.name: rename_section
method.description: Renames a section from [param old_section] to [param new_section], preserving all contained keys and metadata.

method.name: save
method.description: Saves the configuration to disk. If [param path] is empty, uses the last loaded path.

method.name: save_all
method.description: Saves this configuration and all included files to their respective paths. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: save_encrypted
method.description: Saves the configuration to an encrypted file at [param path] using the provided binary [param key]. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: save_encrypted_pass
method.description: Saves the configuration to an encrypted file at [param path] using the provided password [param pass]. Returns an [enum Error] code.

method.name: save_to_base64
method.description: Serializes the configuration to a Base64-encoded string.

method.name: save_to_buffer
method.description: Serializes the configuration to a binary buffer.

method.name: save_to_string
method.description: Serializes the configuration to a plain text string in INI format.

method.name: set_autosave
method.description: Enables or disables autosave. When enabled, changes to the configuration are automatically written to disk.

method.name: set_default_padding
method.description: Sets the default formatting padding used when saving keys and values. This controls spacing before and after keys and values.

method.name: set_global_fallback
method.description: Sets the global [param fallback] [DotIniFile] used when a value is not found in the current instance.

method.name: set_key_comment
method.description: Sets a comment for the specified key within a section.

method.name: set_read_only
method.description: Enables or disables read-only mode. When enabled, modifications to the configuration are not allowed.

method.name: set_section_comment
method.description: Sets a comment for the specified section.

method.name: set_value
method.description: Sets the value for a given section and key.

method.name: set_value_b64
method.description: Encodes the given [param utf8_string] as Base64 and stores it as the value for the specified [param section] and [param key].

method.name: sort_section_keys
method.description: Sorts the keys within the specified [param section] alphabetically. If [param ascending] is [code]false[/code], keys are sorted in descending order.

method.name: to_config_file
method.description: Converts this [DotIniFile] into a [ConfigFile] instance containing the same sections and key-value pairs.

method.name: to_dictionary
method.description: Exports the entire configuration as a dictionary.

signal.name: file_reloaded
signal.description: Emitted when the file is reloaded after detecting external changes.

signal.name: section_erased
signal.description: Emitted when a section is removed.

signal.name: value_changed
signal.description: Emitted when a value is modified.
